name: Cristel's Beef Strips with Sweet & Hot Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the round steak into strips.
2. In a shallow dish, mix water, salt, cooking oil, egg, bread crumbs, ginger, and pepper until well combined.
3. Dredge the beef strips in the mixture, ensuring they are evenly coated on both sides.
4. Heat oil in a pan over medium heat.
5. Add the coated beef strips to the hot oil and cook until golden brown and crispy on both sides.
6. Serve immediately with your choice of sweet and hot sauce.
